final:
module top_module(
    input clk,
    input enable,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);always @(posedge clk) begin
  wire _tap_clk = clk & {1{1'b1}};

    if (enable) begin
        if (Q == 4'b1111) begin
            Q <= 4'b0000;
        end else begin
            Q <= Q + 1;
        end
    end
end

endmodule
